meta.title: Pricing - Mingrun Tech
hero.title: Pick the plan that fits.
hero.body: Start with the free demo to see what it can do, then move to the full workflow when you're ready. At your own pace.
tiers.explore.label: Explore
tiers.explore.title: Free trial
tiers.explore.body: Public demo, basic inference, no sign-up required.
tiers.studio.label: Studio
tiers.studio.title: Full workflow
tiers.studio.body: Projects, datasets, training, model registry, deployment.
tiers.team.label: Team
tiers.team.title: Team collaboration
tiers.team.body: Multi-user workspace, elastic quotas, role-based access.
